title: wendlandia tinctoria subsp. intermedia
intro: Wendlandia tinctoria subsp. intermedia, also known as the Indian gentian or yellow gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding digestion, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. Wendlandia tinctoria subsp. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
